ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last modified */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Scientific domain of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Metadata tags for categorization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the observation belongs to */,
  "observation_number" INTEGER /* Number of the observation within the dataset */,
  "mean_x" REAL /* Mean value of X */,
  "mean_y" REAL /* Mean value of Y */,
  "mean_z" REAL /* Mean value of Z */,
  "sigma_x" REAL /* Standard deviation of X */,
  "sigma_y" REAL /* Standard deviation of Y */,
  "sigma_z" REAL /* Standard deviation of Z */,
  "sigma_r" REAL /* Standard deviation of R */,
  "lambda_1" REAL /* Eigenvalue 1 */,
  "lambda_2" REAL /* Eigenvalue 2 */,
  "lambda_3" REAL /* Eigenvalue 3 */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the observation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the observation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eigenvectors" (
  "eigenvector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eigenvector */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the eigenvector belongs to */,
  "eigenvector_1_x" REAL /* X component of eigenvector 1 */,
  "eigenvector_1_y" REAL /* Y component of eigenvector 1 */,
  "eigenvector_1_z" REAL /* Z component of eigenvector 1 */,
  "eigenvector_2_x" REAL /* X component of eigenvector 2 */,
  "eigenvector_2_y" REAL /* Y component of eigenvector 2 */,
  "eigenvector_2_z" REAL /* Z component of eigenvector 2 */,
  "eigenvector_3_x" REAL /* X component of eigenvector 3 */,
  "eigenvector_3_y" REAL /* Y component of eigenvector 3 */,
  "eigenvector_3_z" REAL /* Z component of eigenvector 3 */,
  "computed_date" TEXT /* Date when the eigenvectors were computed */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used for computation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eigenvector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eigenvectors_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the dataset was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for device and browser information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "changes_summary" TEXT /* Summary of changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "data_range_start" TEXT /* Start date of the data range used in the report */,
  "data_range_end" TEXT /* End date of the data range used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
